name: dual-end-issue-workflow
displayName: Dual-End Issue Workflow (本地编辑 + 远端测试)
description: NHMS/NWM project workflow for implementing or finishing a GitHub issue under the local-edit + remote-test model across TWO role nodes: node-22 (compute_control) is the backend/real-DB pytest oracle; node-27 (display_readonly) is the display/frontend-production/read-only-boundary live-receipt oracle. Claude Code orchestrates; fixes and reviews are delegated to dispatched subagents; backend iteration is driven by node-22 real-DB results, display/frontend live-operationalization by node-27 receipts, while CI is the final merge gate. Instantiates codex-codeagent-workflow and reuses its review vocabulary.
